name: Gloucestershire (United Kingdom)
description: A green field with a blue cross fimbriated white extending to the edges (the 'Severn Cross').
history: Designed by Bart Lacey and chosen in a 2008 public competition; registered with the Flag Institute on 14 February 2008 as the flag of Gloucestershire. Green represents the Cotswolds, blue and white the River Severn.

features.symbolism: green for the Cotswold countryside, blue and white for the River Severn
